name.description: Human-readable name of the entity (person, organization, project, tool, place, event)

entityType.description: Classification: person, organization, project, tool, place, event

description.description: 1-2 sentence description of who/what this entity is

sourceContext.description: Exact quote or context from the source that mentions this entity

name.description: Human-readable name of the concept (idea, theory, pattern, method, framework)

domain.description: Domain or field the concept belongs to (e.g. 'philosophy/psychology')

sourceContext.description: Exact quote or context from the source that discusses this concept

id.description: Unique claim ID following the pattern claim.{slug}

text.description: The assertion text — a single, verifiable statement

sourceLocation.description: Where in the source this claim is found (paragraph, section)

evidence.description: Evidence details (e.g. 'Meta-study, n=1,200, Nature Human Behaviour')

source.description: Name of the source entity or concept

relation.description: Type of relationship (e.g. defined, provided_empirical_evidence_for, contradicted)

target.description: Name of the target entity or concept

context.description: Context or evidence for this relationship

question.description: The open question raised by the source

context.description: Context for why this question is relevant or what prompted it
